text:
1.

 [usr/src/usr.bin/ipcs/ipcs.c:227]: (style) Expression is always false because 'else if' condition matches previous condition at line 198.

Source code is

  if ((display & (MSGINFO | MSGTOTAL))) {
         ...
    } else
        if (display & (MSGINFO | MSGTOTAL)) {
